Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to calculate the total duration for each case... So durations - 2001 1.5h - 2002 25.92h - 2003 48.33h - 2004 1.42h - 2005 77.08h

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the longest cases are 2005 77h 2003 48h and 2002 26h Cases 2001 and 2004 are very fast under 2 hours

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the activities the slow cases have multiple Request Additional Documents steps Case 2003 two Case 2005 three Case 2002 one Whereas fast cases have no Request Additional Documents steps

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the need for additional documents seems to be a major factor And it is more frequent in High complexity cases

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: looking at resources Slow cases 2003 Adjuster Mike two requests 2005 Adjuster Lisa three requests 2002 Adjuster Lisa one request Fast cases Adjuster Mike no requests Adjuster Lisa no requests So for higher complexity adjusters are requesting more documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Regions Slow cases 2003 A 2005 B 2002 B Fast cases 2001 A 2004 B So Region B has both fast and slow Region A has fast and slow So region might not be the primary factor

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Managers Manager Ann has fast 2001 2004 and slow 2002 Manager Bill has slow 2003 2005 But 2002 with Manager Ann is also slow So maybe Manager Bill is slower but not conclusive

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now to confirm Calculate duration for each case again... same numbers The number of Request Additional Documents per case 2001 0 2002 1 2003 2 2004 0 2005 3 And the duration correlates strongly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Calculate time between Evaluate Claim and Approve Claim 2001 0.5h 2002 24.25h 2003 30.33h 2004 0.42h 2005 72.17h This phase is the main contributor

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Root causes High complexity claims require multiple rounds of document requests each adding significant time due to waiting for customer to provide docs and re evaluation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additionally Adjuster Lisa in Region B seems to require more document requests for high complexity cases 3 vs 2 for Adjuster Mike in Region A This could be due to stricter requirements in Region B or different claim characteristics
